chunks.text: Download Ptplot Download Ptplot Note: This is not the most recent version of Ptplot. The most recent version can be found at http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot/ Ptplot is available for download in several format. Each of the formats contai

load in several format. Each of the formats contains the same functionality. Tar and Zip files: Instructions 1.24Mb Gzipped Tar File 1.47Mb Compressed Zip File Java Installer tool: Instructions Note that the Windows installer installs Ptplot in your
